metadata.description: Catalog of 13 AI skills for the research workflow — researcher-led, AI-assisted

plugins.name: research-workspace
plugins.description: 9 research-hub skills: literature search, comparison matrix, planning manifests, design dialog, multi-AI routing, NotebookLM brief verification, paper-memory builder, Zotero curator

plugins.name: academic-writing-skills
plugins.description: Manuscript revision, claim-evidence audit, banned-word / humanize pass, figure-text consistency, journal-format check, reviewer response

plugins.name: zotero-skills
plugins.description: Deep Zotero CRUD beyond research-hub — search, add, update, delete items with notes, tags, collections, PDF attachments. Dual-API (local + Web)

plugins.name: codex-delegate
plugins.description: Hand code-heavy / repetitive / many-file mechanical work from Claude to Codex CLI. Claude supervises; Codex executes

plugins.name: gemini-delegate
plugins.description: Hand long-context reading, bilingual / 繁中 / CJK synthesis, second-opinion review from Claude to Gemini CLI
